subcodes.first_line: The ears must be of the soul, that they may hearken to the voice of the Beloved of the worlds, which hath been raised from the direction of the Prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آذان از جان باید تا ندای محبوب عالمیان را که از شطر سجن مرتفع است اصغا نماید
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @firmness in the Covenant
